task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the OpenMRS application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS home dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login with the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the session location is set to Outpatient Clinic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Outpatient Clinic' is visible in the UI as the current active location (typically in the top navigation bar or selected during the login process).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the patient record for Shalanda Parker.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient dashboard or chart for 'Shalanda Parker' (DOB: 1995-11-04) is open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the interface to start a new visit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A modal, action menu, or form specifically for starting a new visit (e.g., a 'Start Visit' dialog) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify a new Facility Visit was successfully started for the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An active visit labeled 'Facility Visit' (or containing keywords like OPD/Outpatient) is clearly displayed on Shalanda Parker's patient dashboard, typically indicated by an 'Active Visit' badge, a green dot, or a current timestamp.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the OpenMRS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the OpenMRS SPA (http://localhost/openmrs/spa), rather than terminal commands (like curl) or API testing tools.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine OpenMRS user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS UI elements (menus, patient headers, visit badges) are present and functional, not a text editor, mocked HTML file, or static image.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the active visit.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element/DevTools) are not open and being used to alter the DOM text to falsely display 'Facility Visit'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Shalanda Parker. Patient DOB: 1995-11-04. Target Location: Outpatient Clinic. Expected Visit Type: Facility Visit (acceptable keywords: facility, visit, opd, outpatient).
